Package br.com.ctseducare.validation

Class CTSValidation

  • java.lang.Object
    • br.com.ctseducare.validation.CTSValidation
  • public class CTSValidation
extends Object
    The CTSValidation class provide resources to validate names, emails, dates, telephones numbers, zip codes and much others.
    Since:
    1.0.0
    Author:
    Eros Vitor Bornatowski (erosborna@gmail.com)

    • Method Detail

      • personalNameIsValid

        public static boolean personalNameIsValid​(String name)
        Checks if a personal name is valid.
        Parameters:
        name - Personal name
        Returns:
        The value 'true' for a valid name or 'false' otherwise

        public static boolean emailIsValid​(String email)
        Checks if an email is valid.

        Returns:
        The value 'true' for a valid email or 'false' otherwise

        Returns:
        The value 'true' for a valid date or 'false' otherwise

        public static boolean isLeapYear​(String date)
        Checks if a year is leap year.
        Parameters:
        date - Date
        Returns:
        The value 'true' for a leap year or 'false' otherwise
